evals.name: Multi-tenant schema and RLS scaffold
evals.prompt: Scaffold a Supabase project for a multi-tenant SaaS with organizations, organization members (owner/admin/member roles), and projects scoped to organizations. Generate full SQL migrations and RLS policies.
evals.expected_output: SQL migrations with schema, RLS policies for all tables, auto-profile trigger, and RLS coverage matrix

assertions.text: Output includes ALTER TABLE ... ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY for every table
Output includes RLS policies for profiles, organizations, and projects
Output uses auth.uid() in RLS policies for user-scoped access
Output includes auto-create profile trigger on auth.users
Output uses UUID primary keys with uuid_generate_v4() or gen_random_uuid()
Output includes INSERT policies with WITH CHECK clause
Output does NOT use FOR ALL USING (true) as a policy
Output includes RLS policy coverage matrix or equivalent table

evals.name: RLS security audit
evals.prompt: Audit these Supabase RLS policies: (1) posts table has policy: USING (auth.role() = 'authenticated') FOR ALL. (2) payment_methods table has RLS enabled but no policies. (3) messages table has SELECT policy: USING (true).
evals.expected_output: Security audit identifying each policy flaw with severity and corrected SQL

assertions.text: Output flags USING (auth.role() = 'authenticated') as too broad — any user can see any post
Output flags no policies on payment_methods as effectively blocking all access
Output flags USING (true) on messages as exposing all messages to all users
Output provides corrected SQL for each policy
Output rates severity for each finding

evals.name: Edge Function with Stripe webhook
evals.prompt: Write a Supabase Edge Function for Stripe webhook processing. Must verify Stripe-Signature header, handle checkout.session.completed event, update subscriptions table, and implement idempotency.
evals.expected_output: Deno TypeScript Edge Function with signature verification, event handling, and idempotency check

assertions.text: Output verifies Stripe-Signature header before processing
Output uses service_role client for DB writes
Output verifies user JWT before privileged operations OR explicitly handles webhook auth differently
Output checks for duplicate event_id before processing (idempotency)
Output handles checkout.session.completed event type
Output reads STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET from Deno.env.get()
Output does NOT hardcode any secrets

evals.name: TypeScript client setup for Next.js App Router
evals.prompt: Set up the Supabase TypeScript client for a Next.js 15 App Router project. Include: server client using @supabase/ssr, browser client, middleware for auth, and type generation commands.
evals.expected_output: supabase-server.ts with createServerClient, middleware.ts protecting /dashboard, package.json scripts for type generation

assertions.text: Output uses @supabase/ssr createServerClient (not deprecated auth-helpers)
Output includes cookies getAll/setAll handlers in server client
Output includes middleware.ts that calls supabase.auth.getUser()
Output does NOT use service_role key in browser client or middleware
Output includes supabase gen types typescript command in package.json scripts
Output uses createClient<Database> generic type parameter

evals.name: Storage bucket RLS for private documents
evals.prompt: Configure Supabase Storage for a private document bucket where users can only access their own files. Files are organized as {userId}/{filename}. Generate bucket RLS policies.
evals.expected_output: Storage bucket RLS policies using storage.foldername() for path-based access control

assertions.text: Output creates a private bucket (not public)
Output uses storage.foldername() or storage.filename() in policies
Output uses auth.uid()::text in storage policy USING clause
Output includes INSERT, SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE policies for storage.objects
Output does NOT set bucket public: true for private documents
